title: lachnostylis bilocularis
intro: Lachnostylis bilocularis, also known as the Bilocalled Lachnostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a shrub native to Australia that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lachnostylis bilocularis include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as being used to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Lachnostylis bilocularis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
